game_name: The Simpsons: Bart vs. the World

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Bartman Flight
special_mechanics.description: By grabbing a cape item, Bart transforms into Bartman and can fly for limited periods

special_mechanics.name: Jump Design Changes
special_mechanics.description: Development team removed far-reaching jumps and blind jumps from the original Bart vs. Space Mutants game

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative): Sources provide development notes on physics changes made from the first game, but no quantitative movement parameters are documented. Game design focused on removing exploitative jump mechanics and integrating puzzle elements.
sources_used: Wikipedia - The Simpsons: Bart vs. the World (Development section)
